title: Career Opportunity Teacher at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies!
